title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Allen Career Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Allen Career Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allen Career Institute family as a Curriculum Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
